channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.description:

item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Mercedes have accepted the blame for Kimi Antonelli's mechanical failure which likely cost him victory at the British Grand Prix and saw him score no points in the Silverstone race.

item.title: Australia romp past England to secure seventh Women's T20 World Cup title
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Australia dashed England's hopes of a first Women's T20 World Cup win in 17 years and second overall as they romped to a seven-wicket victory at Lord's to secure a record-extending seventh title.

item.title: Some Lebanese Christian villages 'asked to be annexed to Israel', Netanyahu says
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said on Sunday that some Christian villages in southern Lebanon had asked to be annexed by Israel for protection from Hezbollah, a claim made as he reaffirmed that Israeli troops would remain in southern Lebanon for as long as necessary.

item.title: Early menopause may raise lifetime heart disease risk by 40% – Study
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: Women who experience menopause before the age of 40 may face a significantly higher lifetime risk of developing heart disease, according to a new study. The post Early menopause may raise lifetime heart disease risk by 40% – Study appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Nigeria’s crude production rise alongside other members of the Organization of the Petroleum Exporting Countries (OPEC) helped to push up the Organization’s total output by 3.3 million barrels per day (bpd) compared to May. The output rise pushed OPEC’s crude production to reach a total of 19.43 mil

item.title: Nobody above 70 years should run for political office – Pat Utomi
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: A Professor of Political Economy, Pat Utomi, has said that anybody above 70 years of age should not run for political office in Nigeria. Utomi said this in a post on his verified X handle on Sunday. According him: “Impunity and disregard of decent order has become our way. When Yar’Adua

item.title: APC Holds ‘Thank You’ Rally in Ilorin, As Thousands Hail Tinubu, Abdulrazaq, Danladi
item.dc:creator: ThisDay
item.description: Tens of thousands of people comprising leaders, candidates and members of the All Progressives Congress (APC) in Kwara State on Sunday staged a ‘Thank You’ rally in Ilorin for the

item.title: Court adjourns suit challenging APC Magama/Rijau reps’ primary to July 9
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: A Federal High Court sitting in Minna, Niger State, has adjourned until July 9, 2026, the suit challenging the emergence of Prof. Yakubu Mohammed Auna as the All Progressives Congress (APC) candidate for the Magama/Rijau Federal Constituency ahead of the 2027 general election. The suit, filed by Alh

item.title: Arapaja’s loyalists divided over planned defection to APC ahead 2027
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: However, multiple loyalists who spoke on Friday insisted that Arapaja embarked on the move without consulting the The post Arapaja’s loyalists divided over planned defection to APC ahead 2027 appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.title: Thieves steal around €4 million in jewellery from French museum
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: Jewellery worth several million euros has been stolen from the Lalique Museum in northeastern France after burglars broke into the site early on Sunday and targeted its jewellery collection. Around 20 pieces were taken in the raid, with losses estimated at close to four million euros, according to a

item.title: Australia probes mystery space balls that washed up on beach
item.dc:creator: Hacker News
item.description: Article URL: https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c1jyydr7jnjo Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48796334 Points: 4 # Comments: 0

item.title: FIA explains why British GP not restarted on final lap
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: The FIA has explained why the British Grand Prix finished under Safety Car conditions after the display of an "erroneous message" had suggested racing was about to resume for the final lap.

item.title: Troops Conduct 14,221 Operations, Eliminate 1,597 Criminals, Rescue 1,516 Hostages in Six Months
item.dc:creator: ThisDay
item.description: Linus Aleke in Abuja Troops across all theatres of operation conducted 14,221 security operations across the federation through coordinated land, air and maritime missions targeting terrorists, bandits, kidnappers, arms traffickers,

item.title: Iran's supreme leader absent as senior officials attend ayatollah's funeral
item.dc:creator: BBC News World
item.description: Mojtaba Khamenei has not been seen in public since the attack which killed his father at the outset of the US-Israel war with Iran.

item.title: PFIPC Scandal: PDP Alleges ‘Pattern Of Institutional Failure,’ Demands Independent Probe
item.dc:creator: Channels TV
item.description: The controversy centres on Prince Adeniyi Adeyemi, who insists he was lawfully appointed Director-General of the PFIPC, despite the Presidency maintaining that the council is fictitious. The post PFIPC Scandal: PDP Alleges ‘Pattern Of Institutional Failure,’ Demands Independent Probe app

item.title: Chacarra claims maiden LET title at Hulencourt Women's Open
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Carolina Chacarra won her maiden Ladies European Tour title in just her third start by finishing on 12 under at the Hulencourt Women's Open in Belgium.
